observed: M-001 is terminal and contains a successor handoff.
The existing handoff validator validates one promotion record but does not reconcile it with ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
The canonical queue currently contains no M-002 successor item.
inferred: Without queue reconciliation, a structurally valid authorization record and canonical executable work can diverge.
Queue identity, owner, action, priority, evidence requirements, source status, and source blob must be checked together.
proposed: Run validateQueuePromotionGate before accepting handoff-derived work as queued, active, or verified.
superseded: Treating validation of an isolated promotion record as sufficient proof that canonical queue state matches it.
unresolved: The gate is not yet wired into repository-wide CI or queue update tooling.
No owner-authorized M-002 promotion record has been committed.
